debug_info.goal:
S : Type
rule : RelInt S
n : ℕ
f : Fin n → List (RelInt S)
⊢ rule ∈ Graphiti.Projects.Noc.RelInt.liftFinf S n f → ∃ i j, rule = (f i).get j

failed_attempts:
simp only [RelInt.liftFinf, List.flatten, List.mem_join, List.mem_map, List.mem_iff_get]
        rintro ⟨_, ⟨i, _, rfl⟩, j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

  end RelInt

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        simp only [List.mem_flatten, List.mem_map, List.mem_iff_get]
        rintro ⟨_, ⟨i, _, rfl⟩, j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf]
        intro h
        have ⟨_, h1, h2⟩ := List.mem_join.mp h
        have ⟨i, _, rfl⟩ := List.mem_map.mp h1
        have ⟨j, rfl⟩ := List.mem_iff_get.mp h2
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

  end RelInt

dsimp [RelInt.liftFinf, List.flatten]
        simp only [List.mem_join, List.mem_map]
        rintro ⟨_, ⟨i, _, rfl⟩, h⟩
        rcases List.mem_iff_get.1 h with ⟨j, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨i, j, rfl⟩

  end RelInt
